title: Items & Stuff X Enchantment Outline
description: Compatibility for Items & Stuff and Enchantment Outline
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/965e7ec99dc1920e78c8702d8bb12d7df1d3e59d.webp)
# About

**Items & Stuff X Enchantment Outline** is a compatibility pack that blends the stylized Bedrock-inspired visuals of [**Items & Stuff**](https://modrinth.com/project/cGI19PB3) with the glowing enchantment effects of [**Enchantment Outline**](https://modrinth.com/project/jkvjEM8B).  
It ensures both packs display perfectly together, keeping enchanted items crisp, vibrant, and fully consistent with the [**Items & Stuff**](https://modrinth.com/project/cGI19PB3) art style.

## Features

- Provides seamless visual compatibility between [**Items & Stuff**](https://modrinth.com/project/cGI19PB3) and [**Enchantment Outline**](https://modrinth.com/project/jkvjEM8B).  
- Maintains accurate outlines around enchanted items without breaking custom textures.   
- Fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.3+**.  

## Installation

1. Get the most recent version compatible with your Minecraft 1.21.3+ installation.
2. Put it inside your resource pack folder and enable it ingame.
3. Stack the packs in this order:  
‎‎ ![load order v2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64ff61b857b0b1bc7cba8b14a05bd0f34e55afbe.webp)

## Supported Items

<details>
<summary>Supported Items List</summary>
  
- All Varients of Swords
- All Varients of Pickaxes
- All Varients of Axes
- All Varients of Shovels
- All Varients of Hoes
- Shears
- Flint and Steel
- Bow (Vanilla Textures)
- Crossbow (Vanilla Textures)
- Fishing Rod (Vanilla Textures)

</details>
